where_to_eat.name: Chicago Food Scene (General)
where_to_eat.description: Chicago is known for amazing food with tons of options available throughout the city. Visitors praise the diverse and fantastic culinary offerings across different neighborhoods.

into_the_wild.name: Lake Michigan & Waterfront
into_the_wild.description: A scenic natural area where visitors can enjoy views of the lake, including photogenic spots like catching rainbows reflecting on the water near the Metra and expressway.

into_the_wild.name: Parks (General)
into_the_wild.description: Chicago has well-maintained parks that were notably clean during recent community events, with accessible green spaces for walking and enjoying the city.

gram_worthy_spots.name: The Chicago Loop (Architectural Views)
gram_worthy_spots.description: An iconic Chicago location that offers classic urban imagery, including views of the L train and downtown architecture that's popular for photography and art inspiration.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Lake Michigan Rainbow Spots
gram_worthy_spots.description: Scenic waterfront areas near the Metra and expressway where dramatic weather events create stunning photo opportunities with lightning and rainbows reflecting on the water.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Michigan Avenue & Downtown Chicago
gram_worthy_spots.description: Major downtown corridor with significant landmarks and public spaces that serve as popular gathering points and photogenic locations for visitors.
